tools_list.response: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"tools":[{"description":"Compute a natal astrological chart for a given time and location. Returns a ChartGraph in JSON format containing planetary positions, house cusps, aspects, nakshatras, and dignities.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"ayanamsha":{"default":"Tropical","description":"Ayanamsha system for sidereal: Lahiri, FaganBradley, Tropical, etc.","type":"string"},"house_system":{"default":"Placidus","description":"House system: Placidus, Koch, Equal, WholeSign, etc.","type":"string"},"julian_day":{"description":"Julian Day number (TDB)","type":"number"},"latitude":{"description":"Geographic latitude in degrees [-90, +90]","type":"number"},"longitude":{"description":"Geographic longitude in degrees [-180, +180], east positive","type":"number"}},"required":["julian_day","latitude","longitude"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_natal_chart"},{"description":"Compute Vedic dasha (planetary period) sequences. Supports five classical systems: Vimshottari, Ashtottari, Yogini (Moon-longitude based, require `moon_longitude`); Chara, Narayana (Lagna-sign based, require `lagna_sign`). Returns a JSON dasha tree with start/end Julian Days.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"birth_jd":{"description":"Birth Julian Day (TDB) used as the dasha epoch","type":"number"},"lagna_sign":{"description":"Lagna (ascendant) sign 1–12 (1 = Aries). Required for Chara, Narayana.","maximum":12,"minimum":1,"type":"integer"},"levels":{"default":3,"description":"Number of nested dasha levels (1–5). Ignored by Chara and Narayana.","maximum":5,"minimum":1,"type":"integer"},"moon_longitude":{"description":"Natal Moon sidereal longitude in degrees [0, 360). Required for Vimshottari, Ashtottari, Yogini.","maximum":360,"minimum":0,"type":"number"},"system":{"default":"Vimshottari","description":"Dasha system selector","enum":["Vimshottari","Ashtottari","Yogini","Chara","Narayana"],"type":"string"}},"required":["birth_jd"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_dasha"},{"description":"Compute Jaimini Chara Karaka assignments from sidereal planet longitudes. Ranks planets by degrees within their current sign: highest = Atmakaraka (soul significator), lowest = Darakaraka (spouse significator). Supports 7-karaka (Sun–Saturn) and 8-karaka (adds Rahu) schemes.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"jupiter":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Jupiter [0, 360)","type":"number"},"mars":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Mars [0, 360)","type":"number"},"mercury":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Mercury [0, 360)","type":"number"},"moon":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Moon [0, 360)","type":"number"},"rahu":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Rahu [0, 360). Required for scheme '8'.","type":"number"},"saturn":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Saturn [0, 360)","type":"number"},"scheme":{"default":"7","description":"Karaka scheme: '7' (default, Sun–Saturn) or '8' (adds Rahu + Pitrikaraka)","enum":["7","8"],"type":"string"},"sun":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Sun [0, 360)","type":"number"},"venus":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Venus [0, 360)","type":"number"}},"required":["sun","moon","mars","mercury","jupiter","venus","saturn"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_karakas"},{"description":"Compute combustion state for each planet relative to the Sun per BPHS Ch.7 vv.28-29. Returns Combust, DeeplyCombust, or None for Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn with degrees of separation.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"jupiter":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Jupiter [0, 360)","type":"number"},"jupiter_retrograde":{"default":false,"type":"boolean"},"mars":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Mars [0, 360)","type":"number"},"mars_retrograde":{"default":false,"type":"boolean"},"mercury":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Mercury [0, 360)","type":"number"},"mercury_retrograde":{"default":false,"type":"boolean"},"moon":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Moon [0, 360)","type":"number"},"saturn":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Saturn [0, 360)","type":"number"},"saturn_retrograde":{"default":false,"type":"boolean"},"sun":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Sun [0, 360)","type":"number"},"venus":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Venus [0, 360)","type":"number"},"venus_retrograde":{"default":false,"type":"boolean"}},"required":["sun","moon","mars","mercury","jupiter","venus","saturn"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_combustion"},{"description":"Compute full six-fold Shadbala (Sthana, Dig, Kala, Cheshta, Naisargika, Drik Bala) for each planet, plus uccha_bala, ishta_phala, and kashta_phala per BPHS Ch.27-28.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"is_daytime":{"default":false,"type":"boolean"},"moon_phase_waxing":{"default":false,"type":"boolean"},"planets":{"description":"Array of planet data objects.","items":{"properties":{"average_speed":{"type":"number"},"benefic_aspect_count":{"default":0,"type":"integer"},"bhava":{"maximum":12,"minimum":1,"type":"integer"},"longitude":{"maximum":360,"minimum":0,"type":"number"},"malefic_aspect_count":{"default":0,"type":"integer"},"planet":{"description":"Planet name: Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn","type":"string"},"sign":{"maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"speed":{"type":"number"}},"required":["planet","sign","longitude","bhava","speed","average_speed"],"type":"object"},"type":"array"}},"required":["planets"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_shadbala"},{"description":"Compute Vedic divisional charts (vargas) for a given time and location. Supply a list of division codes (e.g. D1, D9, D10) and receive a ChartGraph JSON for each, including planetary positions and dignities within each varga.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"ayanamsha":{"default":"Lahiri","description":"Ayanamsha system for sidereal: Lahiri, FaganBradley, Tropical, etc.","type":"string"},"divisions":{"description":"Varga division codes to compute, e.g. [\"D1\", \"D9\", \"D10\"]","items":{"type":"string"},"minItems":1,"type":"array"},"julian_day":{"description":"Julian Day number (TDB)","type":"number"},"latitude":{"description":"Geographic latitude in degrees [-90, +90]","type":"number"},"longitude":{"description":"Geographic longitude in degrees [-180, +180], east positive","type":"number"},"planet_longitude":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of the planet in degrees [0, 360) for direct varga computation","type":"number"}},"required":["julian_day","latitude","longitude","divisions"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_vargas"},{"description":"Convert a ChartGraph JSON (as produced by compute_natal_chart or compute_vargas) into a target output format for downstream storage or retrieval. Supports Neo4j Cypher, SurrealDB SurrealQL, JSON-LD, plain JSON, and RAG embedding text.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"chart_json":{"description":"ChartGraph JSON as returned by compute_natal_chart or compute_vargas","type":"object"},"classification":{"description":"Optional label or session ID attached to emitted nodes","type":"string"},"format":{"description":"Target output format","enum":["cypher","surreal","jsonld","json","embedding"],"type":"string"}},"required":["chart_json","format"],"type":"object"},"name":"emit_graph"},{"description":"Compute transiting planet positions relative to a natal chart at a specific moment. Returns planet longitudes for the transit time alongside natal positions, enabling aspect calculation between transit and natal placements.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"natal_jd":{"description":"Julian Day of the natal chart (TDB)","type":"number"},"natal_lat":{"description":"Natal geographic latitude in degrees [-90, +90]","type":"number"},"natal_lon":{"description":"Natal geographic longitude in degrees [-180, +180], east positive","type":"number"},"transit_jd":{"description":"Julian Day of the transit moment to compute (TDB)","type":"number"}},"required":["natal_jd","natal_lat","natal_lon","transit_jd"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_transit"},{"description":"Search for transiting planet–natal planet aspects within a time window. Supply natal positions and a Julian Day range; receive a list of exact transit moments with aspect type, orb, and applying/separating status.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"aspects":{"description":"Aspect types to filter (e.g. conjunction, opposition, trine). Defaults to major aspects.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"bodies":{"description":"Transiting bodies to include. Defaults to all planets.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"end_jd":{"description":"End of the search window as a Julian Day (TDB)","type":"number"},"max_orb":{"default":1.0,"description":"Maximum orb in degrees (default 1.0)","type":"number"},"natal_positions":{"description":"Array of natal planet positions to check transits against","items":{"properties":{"longitude":{"description":"Natal sidereal longitude in degrees [0, 360)","type":"number"},"name":{"description":"Planet name (e.g. Mars, Venus)","type":"string"}},"required":["name","longitude"],"type":"object"},"minItems":1,"type":"array"},"start_jd":{"description":"Start of the search window as a Julian Day (TDB)","type":"number"}},"required":["natal_positions","start_jd","end_jd"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_transits"},{"description":"Search for auspicious time windows (muhurta) within a given period for a geographic location. Returns ranked muhurta candidates with quality scores based on tithi, nakshatra, yoga, karana, and planetary positions.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"end_jd":{"description":"End of the search window as a Julian Day (TDB)","type":"number"},"latitude":{"description":"Geographic latitude in degrees [-90, +90]","type":"number"},"longitude":{"description":"Geographic longitude in degrees [-180, +180], east positive","type":"number"},"min_quality":{"default":0.5,"description":"Minimum quality score [0.0, 1.0] for muhurta inclusion (default 0.5)","maximum":1.0,"minimum":0.0,"type":"number"},"start_jd":{"description":"Start of the search window as a Julian Day (TDB)","type":"number"}},"required":["start_jd","end_jd","latitude","longitude"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_muhurta"},{"description":"Compute Bhinna Ashtakavarga (raw bindu tables) and Sarvashtakavarga for all 7 planets from sign positions. Source: BPHS Ch.66 vv.13-68. Trikona/Ekadhipatya Shodhana and Pinda Sadhana are not included.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"jupiter":{"maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"lagna":{"description":"Sign index of Lagna (Ascendant)","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"mars":{"maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"mercury":{"maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"moon":{"maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"saturn":{"maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"sun":{"description":"Sign index of Sun (0=Aries…11=Pisces)","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"venus":{"maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"}},"required":["sun","moon","mars","mercury","jupiter","venus","saturn","lagna"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_ashtakavarga"},{"description":"Compute Gochara (transit interpretation) for the seven grahas against a natal reference sign per BPHS Ch.29. Returns favourable/unfavourable verdict, house from natal, and raw vedha (obstruction) candidates per planet. The natal reference sign is the caller's choice — typically the natal Moon's sign (Chandra Gochara) or the natal Lagna's sign. Rahu and Ketu are not included.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"jupiter":{"description":"Transit sign index of Jupiter","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"mars":{"description":"Transit sign index of Mars","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"mercury":{"description":"Transit sign index of Mercury","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"moon":{"description":"Transit sign index of Moon","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"natal_reference_sign":{"description":"Sign index of the natal reference point — natal Moon for Chandra Gochara, natal Lagna for Lagna-based Gochara","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"saturn":{"description":"Transit sign index of Saturn","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"school":{"default":"Geometry","description":"Exemption profile applied to the raw vedha candidate list","enum":["Geometry","Parashari"],"type":"string"},"sun":{"description":"Transit sign index of Sun (0=Aries … 11=Pisces)","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"},"vedha_table":{"default":"Bphs29","description":"Vedha pair table source","enum":["Bphs29"],"type":"string"},"venus":{"description":"Transit sign index of Venus","maximum":11,"minimum":0,"type":"integer"}},"required":["sun","moon","mars","mercury","jupiter","venus","saturn","natal_reference_sign"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_gochara"},{"description":"Compute the panchanga — the five limbs of the Vedic almanac — for an instant: tithi (lunar day, with paksha and lord), vara (weekday, with lord and Rahu Kalam slot), nakshatra (with pada), yoga (one of the 27 nithya yogas, with degrees remaining), and karana (half-tithi). Takes sidereal longitudes; the caller is responsible for timezone conversion, as all times are UT.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"jd":{"description":"Julian Day (UT), used for the vara","type":"number"},"moon":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Moon [0, 360)","type":"number"},"sun":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Sun [0, 360)","type":"number"}},"required":["jd","sun","moon"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_panchanga"},{"description":"Compute graha drishti — Vedic sign aspects — for all nine grahas. Unlike Western aspects, drishti is cast from sign to sign and is asymmetric: every graha aspects the 7th from itself, and Mars additionally aspects the 4th and 8th, Jupiter the 5th and 9th, Saturn the 3rd and 10th. Returns each aspect with its graded strength (Full, ThreeQuarter, Half, Quarter) and the house distance.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"jupiter":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Jupiter [0, 360)","type":"number"},"ketu":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Ketu [0, 360)","type":"number"},"mars":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Mars [0, 360)","type":"number"},"mercury":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Mercury [0, 360)","type":"number"},"moon":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Moon [0, 360)","type":"number"},"rahu":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Rahu [0, 360)","type":"number"},"saturn":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Saturn [0, 360)","type":"number"},"sun":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Sun [0, 360)","type":"number"},"venus":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of Venus [0, 360)","type":"number"}},"required":["sun","moon","mars","mercury","jupiter","venus","saturn","rahu","ketu"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_drishti"},{"description":"Compute the whole-sign bhava (house) chart from an ascendant. In the Vedic whole-sign system the entire sign containing the ascendant is the 1st bhava, the next sign the 2nd, and so on — houses do not have cusps within signs. Returns the sign of each of the twelve bhavas with its kendra / trikona / dusthana / upachaya classification, and optionally places supplied grahas into their bhavas.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"ascendant":{"description":"Sidereal longitude of the ascendant [0, 360)","type":"number"},"planets":{"additionalProperties":{"type":"number"},"description":"Optional map of graha name to sidereal longitude, e.g. {\"Mars\": 200.4}. Each is placed into its bhava.","type":"object"}},"required":["ascendant"],"type":"object"},"name":"compute_bhavas"}]}}
